title: Dark Spot of the Sun
overview: Akari Taiyo, a 12-year-old fortuneteller, is attacked by a flaming monster, but is rescued by three magical girls who kill the monster and bring her out of a burning house.

title: The Blood-Soaked Future
overview: Akari is brought to Sephiro Fiore and she joins fellow newcomers Seira, Ginka and Luna as they head off to fight the Daemonias.

title: Voices of Condolence
overview: Saying she can't fight anymore, Akari runs away from the organization and stops Meltina and Priscilla from attacking a Daemonia.

title: Is This a Painting?
overview: After Akari finds out that she can hear the voices of the Daemonia, she decides to participate in the fight so she can find her own answers.

title: Ah, Money, Money! How Many Sad Things Must Occur in This World Due to Money?
overview: Ginka's father, who helps fund Sefiro Fiore's operations, has come to visit and invites the girls to a fancy party; Ginka and Yataro reunite with someone they know.

title: To the Ends with the Star
overview: Seira helps Priscilla and Meltina fight a pair of Daemonia; Seira asks to join Priscilla's team, but is convinced to give Akari's team one more chance.

title: A Lovely Holiday
overview: Not wanting to concern the girls with a new development, Etia gives them a day off which the use to tour the city; the girls meet Akari's old fortune-telling mentors.

title: The Overflowing Water
overview: Etia reveals her findings and begs the girls to flee should they encounter their counterpart; the girls fight against a Daemonia and they come face to face with Ginka's counterpart card.

title: The Moon's Light, The Sun's Shadow
overview: As everyone in Sefiro Fiore becomes saddened and frightened by Ginka's disappearance, Luna recalls how her twin sister, Serena, disappeared and contemplates her feelings for Akari.

title: Like Burning Away
overview: Controlled by Cerebrum, Luna heads to Sefiro Fiore where Akari and Seira are unsure how to counter her attacks; the counterpart cards for The Fool and The Magician appear in front of Priscilla and Meltina.

title: Your Path
overview: Forced out of Sefiro Fiore, Akari and the others head to Nagasaki's mansion seeking help; Seira continues her lone search for Luna; Akari finds out about her birth.

title: Choosing Your Destiny
overview: Seira is deeply hurt that she is forced to fight her friend; Akari learns the truth about herself and goes to Cerebrum to ask what he really wants.

title: The Sun's Smile
overview: Akari keeps reliving the anniversary of her mother's death and tries to choose her own fate; Seira, Luna and Ginka go into the final battle.
